caption_text: This photo shows a man sitting inside a cozy café, looking at his smartphone with his hand touching his chin. The café features warm wooden furniture and decor, including a hanging woven lamp above his head and a display case with pastries or items on the right. There is a "CLOSED" sign visible on the glass door in the background. Another person is seated further back, facing away, contributing to the relaxed atmosphere. The image has a casual, candid composition with natural indoor lighting.

Photo of a round, light green cake with a cartoon drawing of a green character holding a purple object on top. The cake is decorated with small colorful beads and two lit green-striped candles. It sits on a white square cake board with handwritten Korean text and a small black heart icon labeled "miannmian." The cake board rests on a pink box, and the background is dark with a partially visible plastic bag and glass on the side.

This screenshot shows a historical figure AI interface featuring Cleopatra VII Philopator. The left sidebar includes a dropdown labeled "Choose a historical figure" with "cleopatra" selected, and a "PERSONA DOSSIER" card detailing Cleopatra's background and keywords like Leadership, Power, Diplomacy, and Statecraft. The main panel displays a detailed persona transcription about leadership qualities and diplomacy, with a user question: "What should diplomacy achieve before force is used?" and Cleopatra's response below. A text input field labeled "Ask Cleopatra VII Philopator a question..." is at the bottom. The overall UI uses a beige and brown color scheme with clean, stacked sections.

This is a UI screenshot of a dialogue interface featuring a conversation with an AI persona of Albert Einstein. The left sidebar allows figure selection with "Albert Einstein" chosen, showing tags like Physics, Relativity, Scientific discovery, and Education. The center panel contains a detailed conversation transcript where Einstein discusses AI and ethical responsibility. The right sidebar displays "Session summary," "Latest pipeline result," and Starter Prompts, including questions like "What matters more in discovery: logic or imagination?". The interface emphasizes a warm, editorial tone with segmented informational cards on 5-stage processing, Generate → Verify, and Multi-turn dialogue.

This photo shows a painting of two people relaxing on a black couch in a living room. One person is sitting with a black baseball cap while the other reclines, holding a phone. The background includes a shelving unit with plants and two windows depicting a smiling sun and two snowmen. The signature in the bottom right suggests the artist's name or initials.

This photo shows a group of nine cats gathered in a room with light wood flooring. One cat is resting on a two-tiered cat bed placed against a white wall, while the others are sitting or standing around it on the floor. The cats vary in color and fur patterns, including gray, black, white, and brown tabby. The scene is well-lit, and the cats appear calm and observant.

This is a blurry photo of a person standing outdoors at night. The individual is wearing a dark jacket with hands in pockets, and people can be seen sitting or standing on a grassy area in the background. The scene includes distant streetlights and a clear dark sky, indicating an open and possibly public space. The image's motion blur and lighting create a soft, diffused effect.

This photo shows a person lying down outdoors on a patterned play mat, partially covered with a gray blanket featuring white cloud and heart designs. The individual is wearing a dark jacket and a dark cap, with their eyes closed, suggesting rest or sleep. The surrounding ground is covered with brown wood chips, typical of playground or park flooring. The image is captured from a slightly elevated angle above the person's head.

This screenshot displays a web interface titled "Visual Storytelling from Images + Sentiment," featuring image upload options, sentiment choices (happy, sad, suspenseful, mysterious, heartwarming, playful), and a slider to set the max number of sentences. The layout includes an upload panel on the left, a story generation section on the right with fields for Title and Generated Story, and expandable analysis panels below with scene observations, sequence memory, unresolved ambiguities, evaluation report, compliance scores, flags/warnings, and evaluator summary. The dark-themed interface highlights detailed image annotations and text like "Generate Story" and sentiment keywords.

This screenshot shows a vertical sidebar interface for a tool called "Visual Storytelling from Images + Sentiment." The top section, labeled "Build the sequence," includes a drag-and-drop upload area with the prompt "Drop File Here - or - Click to Upload" and a sentiment selector with options like Happy, Sad, Suspenseful, Mysterious, Heartwarm, and Playful. Below is a "Generate Story" button and a "Max sentences" input set to 5. The lower sections show a "Sequence preview" area for storyboard order and a "WORKSPACE STATUS" panel with options to regenerate or generate grounded stories, plus a "Story workspace" area currently empty and stating "AWAITING IMAGE SEQUENCE." The interface uses soft beige tones and a clean, minimalist layout.
